identity_boundary: 本轮是归档执行包，不是功能开发包。
本轮不做 admission 新实验与效果评估。
本轮只执行归档推送、远端验证、本地回退和最小构建。

archive_execution.snapshot_message: chore: archive multimodel experiment snapshot through r25

recoverability_checks: remote branch head can be resolved by ls-remote
R25 report file can be read from origin/archive branch
README index contains R25 section on remote branch
key code/doc paths are enumerated in remote commit tree
non_exaggeration_boundary: git-lfs is unavailable in current environment
large model binaries (.onnx/.mlpackage/.pth) are not fully mirrored to remote git history by design
